## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Motivation & Context

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Testing

How have you tested this change? Please describe the test cases you've verified.

- [ ] Tested with single Meshtastic device
- [ ] Tested with multiple mesh nodes
- [ ] Tested with different LoRa configurations
- [ ] Tested with different operating systems
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests
- [ ] Verified no performance regressions

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the PEP 8 style guidelines
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings for new functions
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] I have not introduced any breaking changes without documentation

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Additional Notes

Any other information that reviewers should know.
